reference: I bumped my shin and at the time didn't think anything of it. Two days later, I noticed it was swollen. Three days later, the swelling has not noticeably gone down and there is some yellow bruising around it. It is not painful to the touch. Should I be concerned?
text: I bought my shirt, and after trying to dip it in the water I loved it. Two days later I noticed it was swelling. Three days later the swelling has not noticedly gone down, and there is some yellow bruising around it. It is not painful to the touch, should I be concerned?
